ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "collection" TEXT /* Collection the product belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the product is designed for */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing chart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the chart belongs to */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the sizing chart (e.g., Numeric Size, Natural Waist) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of sizing chart (e.g., body measurement, garment specification) */,
  "default_unit" INTEGER /* Default unit of measurement for the chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing chart the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., XXS, XS, S) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the measurement (e.g., 00, 0-2, 4-6) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit of measurement for the value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_measurements_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES sizing_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment style */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the style belongs to */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment style (e.g., Regular, Tall) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment style */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type of the garment style (e.g., slim, relaxed) */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type the garment style is designed for (e.g., hourglass, rectangular) */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the garment style (e.g., mini, maxi) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_styles_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement unit (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the measurement unit (e.g., in, cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, customer service) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing chart being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the chart */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the chart was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES sizing_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer size */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the size belongs to */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing chart the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer's size (e.g., XXS, XS, S) */,
  "size_value" TEXT /* Value of the customer's size (e.g., 00, 0-2, 4-6) */,
  "preferred_size" INTEGER /* Whether the size is the customer's preferred size */,
  "purchase_history" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has purchased the size before */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES sizing_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing chart the permission applies to */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES sizing_charts ("chart_id")
)
